Package de.marcandreher.fusionkit.core.auth.handlers

Class OAuth2LoginHandler

java.lang.Object
de.marcandreher.fusionkit.core.auth.handlers.OAuth2LoginHandler
All Implemented Interfaces:
LoginHandler
Direct Known Subclasses:
DiscordLoginHandler, GitHubLoginHandler
public abstract class OAuth2LoginHandler extends Object implements LoginHandler
